2026-05-02.notes: Assumed a moderate pace for 500m swim for an 88kg male. Duration and heart rate are estimates based on this pace.

Assumed a vigorous walking pace for an 88kg male focused on body recomposition. Average step count to duration approximation used (100 steps/minute). Calories are an estimate based on walking at a moderate pace for an 88kg individual. Strain score reflects moderate effort over a sustained period.
